scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n backend,frontends -c yellow,blue "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontends"
scripts.dev:frontends: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs && concurrently -n dashboard,admin,driver -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:driver"
